title: UPI OC No 76C FY 2025 26 Addendum to NPCI UPI 2025 26 OC76 Revision in transaction limits based on merchant & transactions type
text:
NPCI/UPI/OC — 76C/2025-26

To,

All Members of the Unified Payments Interface (UPI)

Dear Sir/Madam

NEC)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

8 April 2025

Subject: Addendum to NPCI/UPI/2024-25/0C76 - Revision in transaction limits based on
merchant & transactions type
NPCI vide circular NPCI/UPI/2019-20/0C76 dated 31% October 2019, NPCI/UPI/2023-24/OC76A
dated 12°" March 2024 and NPCI/UPI/2024-25/OC76B dated 23 August 2024 had released
guidelines regarding transaction limits based on merchant segment and transaction types.

Considering the constantly expanding UPI merchant ecosystem for both domestic and

international transactions, and the impending risks which can arise, it is advised that the following

guidelines to be taken note of and implemented by respective entities.

Sr. No Description Circular reference and remarks
NPCI/UPI/2019-20/0C/76,

NPCI/UPI/2023-24/0C76A &
1 transactions (Initiation mode '04' and '05')
; NPCI/UPI/20234-25/0C76B
shall be disallowed. .
(Existing No change)
Payee PSP shall ensure Intent based NPCI/UPI/2019-20/0C/76,
D transactions (Initiation mode '04' or '05') shall | NPCI/UPI/2023-24/OC76A &
be disallowed for all 'Offline' non-verified NPCI/UPI/20234-25/0C76B
merchants. (Existing No change)
QR share & Pay shall have a limit of INR NPCI/UPI/2019-20/OC/76,
S) 2000/- for all P2P transactions (Payer PSP to | NPCI/UPI/2023-24/OC76A &
ensure that UPI app to identify the same). NPCI/UPI/20234-25/0C76B
